news.title: Stock Selloff Eases as Futures Rise, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
news.description: The biggest monthly selloff in global stocks since 2022 moderated after the US gave Iran more time to reach a deal on ending the month-long war. Oil edged lower.

news.title: US Stock Markets | Iran war clouds policy path as Fed watches price pressures rise
news.description: Lisa Cook has warned that the Federal Reserve is increasingly concerned about rising inflation risks due to the ongoing Iran conflict. While the labour market remains broadly stable, she noted it is fragile and could weaken if higher costs start impacting business activity.

news.title: India Gold Price Today: Gold Rises Significantly as Bitcoin World Data Reveals Bullish Momentum
news.description: BitcoinWorld India Gold Price Today: Gold Rises Significantly as Bitcoin World Data Reveals Bullish Momentum Gold prices in India recorded a notable increase today, according to the latest market data compiled by Bitcoin World, signaling a shift in investor sentiment toward the traditional safe-haven asset. This upward movement, observed across major Indian bullion hubs including Mumbai, Delhi, and Chennai, comes amidst a complex global economic landscape. Analysts are closely monitoring [...] This post India Gold Price Today: Gold Rises Significantly as Bitcoin World Data Reveals Bullish Momentum first appeared on BitcoinWorld .

news.title: Gold and silver ETFs fall up to 5%. Should investors buy the dip or stay cautious?
news.description: Gold and silver ETFs fell up to 5% despite a recovery in MCX prices, driven by a weaker dollar and easing geopolitical tensions. Experts attribute the recent decline to higher yields and profit booking, but suggest SIP-based investing to capitalise on dips, citing strong medium-term fundamentals for precious metals.
